summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Music Hub iteration 6 new features: artist connection graph with react-force-graph-2d, Billboard audio previews via Deezer API, and French UI. All major features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/artist/27/graph returns nodes and links for Daft Punk graph with 15 nodes and 21 connections
GET /api/deezer/tracks/batch returns preview URLs for Billboard songs with album covers
GET /api/deezer/track/search returns Deezer preview for Shape of You
Artist graph page (/artist/27/graph) shows interactive force-directed graph with artist photos
Graph shows nodes count (15 artistes) and links count (21 connexions) in header
Graph page has 'Retour' button that navigates back to artist page
Artist page shows 'Graphe de connexions' button that links to graph page
Billboard page shows album covers (19 found) and play buttons for each song
Billboard audio previews play inline when clicking play button with proper state management
Home page loads correctly with search functionality
Search functionality works with dropdown results
Artist pages load with all sections including top tracks and albums
Billboard year-end charts work with year selector (2010-2026)
Blind Test page loads with player name input and start game functionality
All navigation between pages works correctly
French UI text displays properly throughout the application
Audio players show playing/paused states correctly
Graph visualization renders with artist photos and interactive elements

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components and integrations working
success_percentage.new_features: 100% - Artist graph and Billboard audio previews fully functional
